title: Jönköping Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Jönköping with a Z-Score of -3.26. This event has a critical score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current temperature in Jönköping is significantly lower than average, with a high Z-Score indicating a rare event. 
 The cold snap is expected to last for several days, with average heating degree days (HDD) reaching 12.4 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 66% and wind speed is moderate at 8.6 km/h, exacerbating the cold conditions.
conclusion: Implement emergency measures to mitigate the effects of the cold snap immediately.
